'''zhoyanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylic|xylic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylic|xylic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhoyanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyanithi|zhoyanithi]] || [[word:zhoyaniji|zhoyaniji]] || [[word:zhoyanishi|zhoyanishi]] || [[word:zhoyaniki|zhoyaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyanuthuthu|zhoyanuthuthu]] || [[word:zhoyanujuju|zhoyanujuju]] || [[word:zhoyanushushu|zhoyanushushu]] || [[word:zhoyanukuku|zhoyanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyanuthu|zhoyanuthu]] || [[word:zhoyanuju|zhoyanuju]] || [[word:zhoyanushu|zhoyanushu]] || [[word:zhoyanuku|zhoyanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyanufthuf|zhoyanufthuf]] || [[word:zhoyanufjuf|zhoyanufjuf]] || [[word:zhoyanufshuf|zhoyanufshuf]] || [[word:zhoyanufkuf|zhoyanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyanethe|zhoyanethe]] || [[word:zhoyaneje|zhoyaneje]] || [[word:zhoyaneshe|zhoyaneshe]] || [[word:zhoyaneke|zhoyaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyanothotho|zhoyanothotho]] || [[word:zhoyanojojo|zhoyanojojo]] || [[word:zhoyanoshosho|zhoyanoshosho]] || [[word:zhoyanokoko|zhoyanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyanotho|zhoyanotho]] || [[word:zhoyanojo|zhoyanojo]] || [[word:zhoyanosho|zhoyanosho]] || [[word:zhoyanoko|zhoyanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyanofthof|zhoyanofthof]] || [[word:zhoyanofjof|zhoyanofjof]] || [[word:zhoyanofshof|zhoyanofshof]] || [[word:zhoyanofkof|zhoyanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoyanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŠthĂŠ|zhoyanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŠjĂŠ|zhoyanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŠshĂŠ|zhoyanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoyanĂŠkĂŠ|zhoyanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoyanathatha|zhoyanathatha]] || [[word:zhoyanajaja|zhoyanajaja]] || [[word:zhoyanashasha|zhoyanashasha]] || [[word:zhoyanakaka|zhoyanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoyanatha|zhoyanatha]] || [[word:zhoyanaja|zhoyanaja]] || [[word:zhoyanasha|zhoyanasha]] || [[word:zhoyanaka|zhoyanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoyanafthaf|zhoyanafthaf]] || [[word:zhoyanafjaf|zhoyanafjaf]] || [[word:zhoyanafshaf|zhoyanafshaf]] || [[word:zhoyanafkaf|zhoyanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhoyanasha|zhoyanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoyanshĂ«asha|zhoyanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoyanroasha|zhoyanroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoyanmuasha|zhoyanmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoyanyaasha|zhoyanyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoyannkshĂ«asha|gozhoyannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoyannkroasha|gozhoyannkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoyannkmuasha|gozhoyannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoyannkyaasha|gozhoyannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhoyayanasha|zhoyayanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoyayanshĂ«asha|zhoyayanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoyayanroasha|zhoyayanroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoyayanmuasha|zhoyayanmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoyayanyaasha|zhoyayanyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoyayannkshĂ«asha|gozhoyayannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoyayannkroasha|gozhoyayannkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoyayannkmuasha|gozhoyayannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoyayannkyaasha|gozhoyayannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zheyĂŠnasha|zheyĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zheyĂŠnshĂ«asha|zheyĂŠnshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zheyĂŠnroasha|zheyĂŠnroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zheyĂŠnmuasha|zheyĂŠnmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zheyĂŠnyaasha|zheyĂŠnyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠnnkshĂ«asha|gozheyĂŠnnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠnnkroasha|gozheyĂŠnnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠnnkmuasha|gozheyĂŠnnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozheyĂŠnnkyaasha|gozheyĂŠnnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhoyfanasha|zhoyfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoyfanshĂ«asha|zhoyfanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoyfanroasha|zhoyfanroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoyfanmuasha|zhoyfanmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoyfanyaasha|zhoyfanyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoyfannkshĂ«asha|gozhoyfannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoyfannkroasha|gozhoyfannkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoyfannkmuasha|gozhoyfannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoyfannkyaasha|gozhoyfannkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
